prompt: A high-fashion studio portrait of a young woman posed from the waist up against a seamless vivid red background, centered in frame, with her face fully obscured by a solid vertical censor rectangle in a warm brown skin-tone color. She has copper red hair styled in multiple messy mini buns on top with long defined spiral ringlets cascading down both sides, creating a playful Y2K editorial look. She wears black rectangular eyeglasses partially visible at the left edge of the censor bar, and her right ear is covered in stacked silver piercings and one long dangling charm earring. Her outfit is a distressed layered gray ensemble: a sheer mesh short-sleeve top over a fitted inner layer, plus extra-long detached fingerless arm warmers or sleeves with visible overlock seams and worn edges. She also wears layered silver chain necklaces. Her nails are long, sharply tapered acrylics in metallic lavender chrome. In her right hand, held beside her chest, she displays an open blue Game Boy Advance SP angled toward the camera, with a dark inactive screen and clearly visible controls. Her left hand rises to her chin in a soft fashion pose, fingers bent delicately. The image should feel like a clean commercial editorial photo with crisp detail, soft even studio lighting, realistic skin and fabric texture, saturated color contrast between the gray clothing and red backdrop, and a cool alt-girl retro-gaming aesthetic.
